title: ANC - ANC and Transparency are Off, make a call, ANC is off but active and Transparency is disabled
scenario: ANC activates during a call and Transparency becomes greyed out when both modes are set to OFF on Poly Bluetooth device
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Press the Call button on the device or initiate a call from the app
Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode controls in Audio Settings during the call
expected: When ANC and Transparency are both OFF, during a call both controls should remain OFF and the user should be able to adjust them as needed.
